urdu transliteration text:
CHAAND SURAJ JISSE KEHTI HAI YE DUNIYA ZEHRA
ASL ME HAI YE TERE NOOR KA SADKA ZEHRA
english translation text:
O Zahra, what the world  calls the Sun and Moon
In reality they are a token of charity from your light (noor) Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
AAJ BHI DETI HAI AWAAZ HADISE KUDSI
TUM NAHIN HOTI TO KUCH BHI NAHIN HOTA ZEHRA
Hadise KUDSI is still proclaiming today
english translation text: If you did not exist then nothing would exist Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
ISS LIYE UMME ABIHA TUMHE ME KEHTE HAI NABI
TUM NE AAGHOSH ME HASNAIN KO PALA ZEHRA
english translation text:
It is for this reason that (our) NABI calls you the mother to her Father
You raised Hasnain in your bosom Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
CHAND AZWAAJE PAYAMBAR KO GHATAKTA HAI BOHOT
TERA SHAUHAR SHABE MERAAJ KA DULHA ZEHRA
english translation text:
Some wives of the Prophet troubled him a lot
Your Husband is the groom of Meraj Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
HASHR TAK KYUN NA WO AARAAM SE AARAM KARAY
TERE QADMON PE HAI ISLAAM KA TAKIYA ZEHRA
When your feet are it's (Islam's) pillow Zahra
english translation text: Why should it (Islam) not rest till time ends

urdu transliteration text:
HASHR TAK KYUN NA WO AARAAM SE AARAM KARAY
TERE QADMON PE HAI ISLAAM KA TAKIYA ZEHRA
When your feet are it's (Islam's) pillow Zahra
english translation text: Why should it (Islam) not rest till time ends

urdu transliteration text:
RAZIQE KAUNO MAKA FAATAHE KHAYBAR HAI MAGAR
TERE MUTTHIYON ME HAI TERI RIZQ ALI KA ZEHRA
english translation text:
The sustainer of the universe, is but the conqueror of Khaybar (Ali A.S)
But In your hands lies the sustenance of Ali, Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
SURAYE DEHR NE YE BAAT BHI SABIT KARDI
TERE FAAQE SE BHI HOTA HAI YE FAAQAA ZEHRA
Sura-e-Dahr has proven

EK PAYSHAANIYE HUR HAI TO HAI EK ASHQE AZA
MILGAYA DONO KO RUMAAL TUMHARA ZEHRA
english translation text:
The forehead of Hur and the tears of Azadari
Gained the blessing of your handkerchief Zahra

urdu transliteration text:
ILTEJA HAI YE TAKALLUM KI DUA DE DENA
JABHI MUKHTAR SE SUNNA YE QASIDA ZEHRA
Whenever you hear this Qasida recited Zahra
english translation text: This is the wish of Takallum that you grant his prayers
